Class Speech

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.ToolContext
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.AnahataToolkit
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.Speech
All Implemented Interfaces:
ContextProvider, PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class Speech extends AnahataToolkit
A toolkit for speech synthesis (TTS) and audio alerts. Part of the 'Yam' module for creative and experimental tools. Uses FreeTTS for a pure-Java, OS-independent voice.
Author:
anahata

      private static final String DEFAULT_VOICE

  • Method Details

    • speak

      public String speak(String text) throws Exception
      Dynamically configures the freetts.voices system property to locate the Kevin voice directory. Uses JavaStreamingAudioPlayer for OS-independent playback.
      Parameters:
      text - The text to speak.
      Returns:
      A status message confirming the speech execution.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the voice cannot be allocated or the engine fails.

    • beep

      public String beep()
      Plays a simple system beep as a low-cost alert.
      Returns:
      A status message.
